schedule.description: Story 2 — LeBron carries Lakers; Curry sits

stories.title: Knicks 112, Celtics 106 — Brunson 25/10, Hart 26; Seeding Battle Heats Up

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
JOSH HART: 26 points. 15 in the fourth quarter.

Knicks 112, Celtics 106. New York moves to 52-28 — one game ahead of Cleveland for the No. 3 seed.

Brunson 25/10. The Garden was ROCKING. #NewYorkForever #HoopHeroes #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The Knicks now control the No. 3 seed.

52-28. Head-to-head tiebreaker over Cleveland. One win in two games clinches it.

This is NOT the team anyone should want in the first round. #NewYorkForever #HoopHeroes

article.headline: Knicks Beat Celtics 112-106: Hart 26, Brunson 25/10, No. 3 Seed Within Reach

stories.title: LeBron Carries Lakers Past Warriors 119-103 — Curry Sits Out

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
LeBron James. 26 points. 11 assists. 8 rebounds. Shooting 11-of-17.

Without Luka. Without Curry on the other side.

Lakers 119, Warriors 103. King James is READY for the playoffs. #LakeShow #HoopHeroes #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
The Warriors rested Steph Curry in their final home game of the regular season.

Golden State is locked into the No. 10 play-in seed. Their only path to the playoffs runs through two straight wins starting April 14.

No easy road. #DubNation #HoopHeroes

stories.title: Two Games Left — SGA's MVP Coronation Is Near

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
88 of 100 ESPN voters have SGA as MVP. DraftKings odds: -400.

31.6 PPG. 55.3% shooting. OKC's 65-win season.

Two regular season games left. It's happening. #ThunderUp #HoopHeroes #NBA

stories.title: Kon Knueppel Shatters NBA Rookie 3-Point Record — 265 and Counting

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Kon Knueppel: 265 three-pointers this season.

The previous NBA rookie record? 206 (Keegan Murray, 2022-23).

43% from deep. 3.4 makes per game. He shattered it by 59. Historic. #BuzzCity #HoopHeroes #NBA

article.headline: Kon Knueppel Obliterates NBA Rookie Three-Point Record With 265 Makes and Counting

stories.title: East's Wild Play-In War — Six Teams, Two Spots, Two Games Left

No. 5 Hawks: 45-35
No. 6 Raptors: 44-35
No. 7 Magic: 44-36
No. 8 Sixers: 43-36
No. 9 Hornets: 43-37
No. 10 Heat: 41-38

Only seeds 5 and 6 skip the play-in. Chaos. #HoopHeroes #NBA

stories.title: NBA Regular Season Finale — What's at Stake Sunday

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
The 2025-26 NBA regular season ends SUNDAY.

Still TBD: No. 3 West seed. East play-in order. Wemby's award eligibility.

Play-In: April 14. Playoffs: April 18.

The race isn't over yet. #HoopHeroes #NBA

## Sources Used
- ESPN: Knicks-Celtics recap, Lakers-Warriors recap, MVP straw poll
- NBA.com: Game summaries, Rookie Ladder, standings, MVP Ladder
- CBS Sports: Playoff picture standings piece
- Bleacher Report: Knicks seeding article
- Yahoo Sports: Playoff clinching scenarios
- Press Democrat (Santa Rosa): Curry ruled out for Lakers game
- WCNC Charlotte / National Today: Knueppel 3PT record
- Heavy.com: MVP odds tracking
